Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

are you addicted to pariprashnena.com?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-08-17 · 17 answers
how many times do you visit the site per day?
user [2] · 2007-08-17
I do tri-sandhyam, after Gayatri, :)
user [19] · 2007-08-17
I lost count how many times I visit this damm site!!!
user [33] · 2007-08-17
depends on what I am doing. If I am working at my computer then I have several windows open and this forum is one of those windows. There are several other sites I do the same with and check periodically during my worktime at the computer. Shh....dont tell the boss!
user [2] · 2007-08-17
do you know about RSS, Prabhu? It saves lots of time, one window for all.
http://www.pariprashnena.com/discussion/7/what-are-rss-feeds/#Item_2
user [33] · 2007-08-17
Thanks for the link. I have never tried RSS but will do so.
user [40] · 2007-08-17
I dont think I am addicted but I do come and look here a lot. I use rss so I can see every new post. Its great, I really appreciate it. I thank you all for it.
user [24] · 2007-08-17
not sure if im addicted or not. I check it several times throughout the day when i need a break from my work or i just need to procrastinate. its a great resource and Im learning a lot.

thanks Jagannatha-misra Prabhu for getting this happening.
user [2] · 2007-08-17
[quote][cite] ekendra:[/cite]not sure if im addicted or not. I check it several times throughout the day when i need a break from my work or i just need to procrastinate. its a great resource and Im learning a lot.

thanks Jagannatha-misra Prabhu for getting this happening.[/quote]

I just contributed the original idea and little more. There is an unknown real webmaster behind the scenes.. you know who he is :)
user [40] · 2007-08-27
OK Im addicted

sorry cant stay Im off to post in another thread
user [19] · 2007-08-27
does over 400 posts mean i am addicted?
:)
user [40] · 2007-08-27
Ill say

i only made 83 and I thought I needed counseling, oh and my family are planning an intervention
user [2] · 2007-08-27
I have an acute case of pariprashnenitis... any doctor in the audience?
user [40] · 2007-08-27
355 posts to you, youll need therapy soon
user [78] · 2007-08-27
hehe lol :D
user [157] · 2007-09-05
Will this cure the material contamination of our souls?
user [33] · 2007-09-05
Ok, It is official - I am addicted. When is the next P.A. (pariprashnena.com anonymous) meeting?
user [2] · 2007-09-05
